description: The competition rocket team is overshooting their target altitude category. The motor is strictly locked to an Estes C6-5. Your task is to lower the apogee into the 200m - 250m window by increasing the airframe drag and mass, starting with the design at /home/ga/Documents/rockets/altitude_tuning_rocket.ork. Ensure the rocket remains stable with a stability margin of at least 1.0 caliber. Save the modified rocket design and write a modification report to /home/ga/Documents/exports/altitude_tuning_report.txt documenting the original length, the new length, the final apogee, and the stability margin.
